goal.statement: 建立一條可重播、可追溯、不可寫入的 EOD/as-of K 線分析路徑，從 K1 OHLCV fixture 經 period aggregation、read model、K 線 UI，到真實 Chromium/Playwright 設計驗證。
goal.success_definition: K2、K3、K4、K5 各自產生可檢查的 contract/test/evidence，所有必要 gate 通過，且沒有 provider、即時 feed、auth、CRUD、下單或 K6 promotion。
goal.product_positioning: 量化分析儀表板，不是即時看盤或交易終端。

authority.commit_push: not implied by this package; require separate user instruction
authority.external_lh_boundary: current LH driver remains report-only; this package does not authorize LH to patch, commit, push, promote, or invoke providers

loop_policy.stage_transition: after a stage's declared checks pass and its evidence is written, automatically start the next stage; do not wait for a human review between K2 and K5

failure_budget.after_limit: stop the loop and ask the user; do not retry through an alternate route or continue to the next stage
failure_budget.counter_reset: only after a passing acceptance attempt or explicit user direction

ambiguity_policy.trigger: market calendar, period boundary, adjustment policy, contract meaning, UI behavior, evidence meaning, or any other required semantic is unclear
ambiguity_policy.action: stop immediately and ask the user

hard_stop_policy.trigger: network call, provider invocation, look-ahead, non-determinism, forbidden write surface, missing provenance, contradictory evidence, unplanned scope fork, or three consecutive failed attempts
hard_stop_policy.action: stop current stage, preserve evidence, report the blocking condition, and wait for user direction

stages.goal: 從 K1 EOD bars deterministic 產生 1D、1W、M、Q，保留市場日曆、時區、完整性與不可用語意。

outputs.implementation_boundary: period aggregation and its tests only

periods.1W: one complete trading week using the market calendar
periods.M: one complete market month; incomplete input is partial or unavailable
periods.Q: one complete market quarter; incomplete input cannot become accepted

contract.look_ahead: only rows available at or before as_of may enter an aggregated bar

required: 1D/1W/M/Q outputs are deterministic and digestable
Taiwan, US, and TAIFEX session/timezone boundaries are not mixed
M/Q incomplete data is explicitly partial or unavailable
OHLCV aggregation invariants hold
as_of boundary and post-cutoff row tests pass
no provider, network, browser, or write route is introduced

hard_stops: calendar or M/Q completeness semantics unclear

stages.goal: 把 K2 結果封裝成帶 instrument、period、as_of、provenance、quality 與 indicator metadata 的 read-only view model。

outputs.implementation_boundary: read model and read-only route/tests only

contract.indicator_boundary: metadata and deterministic values are produced from the accepted snapshot; browser does not derive financial values
contract.read_only_boundary: GET only; POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE fail closed; no auth, CRUD, order, or broker route
contract.provenance: source, snapshot digest, as_of, available_at, reason codes remain inspectable

required: view model validates against its schema
valid, partial, empty, unsupported, and invalid states remain distinct
future rows are hidden or rejected by as_of rules
digest is deterministic
read-only routes return expected GET/405/404 behavior
network patch and browser-side financial derivation tests pass

stages.goal: 以 K3 read model 建立可讀取的 K 線 UI block，包含價格/成交量、period selector、MA/EMA、quality/empty/unsupported states。

contract.library: Lightweight Charts bundled through npm; no CDN or runtime external script
contract.network: browser request audit permits loopback only; no provider fetch

required: all declared blocks render from K3 data without hidden recalculation
period and indicator controls have stable DOM selectors
empty, partial, unsupported, and invalid states are visible and do not fall back silently
bundled assets build and preview offline
static/reducer and DEV read-only route checks pass
console and network instrumentation is ready for K5

stages.goal: 用真實 Chromium/Playwright 驗證 K 線 UI 的資料、互動、畫面、runtime boundary 與 responsive 行為。

outputs.implementation_boundary: browser test/evidence only; no product scope expansion

contract.baseline_policy: only human-reviewed Chromium/runtime changes may update pixel baselines

required: all V1-V7 cases in the design validation matrix have evidence
pixel hashes are stable under the pinned runtime
no uncaught console error
no external request
responsive smoke has no horizontal overflow
full Python tests, LH preflight, preview, and browser gate pass

evidence_contract.status_rule: stage pass is only a mechanical result that may unlock the next stage; it is not product acceptance, and only the user or an explicitly named human reviewer may mark final acceptance

final_acceptance.purpose: perform one consolidated acceptance of K2-K5 evidence after K5 finishes
required_conditions: K2, K3, K4, and K5 evidence artifacts exist and pass their declared mechanical contracts
no stage stop condition was triggered
final full tests, LH preflight, preview, and Chromium gate pass
no provider, network, credential, write, order, or K6 promotion was introduced
final_acceptance.k6_transition: only the user may decide whether to begin K6 after this final acceptance

required: K2, K3, K4, and K5 evidence artifacts exist and pass their declared mechanical contract
all evidence includes changed files, command results, digests, and stage-gate state
no network/provider/credential/order/write capability is added
one final consolidated acceptance is performed after K5
K6 remains user-owned and unstarted
global_acceptance.handoff_to_k6: only after K5 evidence is human-reviewed; this package never performs that promotion

approval.review_note: User approved execution of the K2-K5 mechanical gates and the final human acceptance. Stage transitions remain evidence-gated; final acceptance is not self-marked by the agent.
